notes: Passive - scans all <script> tags for ones of type application/json or whose content starts with '{' or '[', parses them as JSON, and shows a draggable modal titled 'JSON Scripts Found: N' with a dropdown to select between them and a pretty-printed preview. Wikipedia articles embed an application/ld+json script (Wikidata structured data), so this page should always have at least one JSON block.

checks.comment: Modal title should appear, indicating at least one JSON script was found
Pretty-printed JSON preview should have content
At least one JSON entry in the selector dropdown
